title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
"Massive haul" recorded. An amazing result.
Thank you very much, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
It is not a problem. I can keep the extra dolls as
decorations in my room.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
When I look at these dolls, I detect a warm
feeling deep inside my chest.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
In short, one might say they have a stabilizing
effect on my mental well-being.
